title: US-Israel war with Iran widens as strikes continue
summary_full: The crisis in the Middle East has widened after Israel and the US attacked Iran on Saturday with major strikes.
summary_public: The crisis in the Middle East has widened after Israel and the US attacked Iran on Saturday with major strikes.
